productDisplayName: Batman Men Batman Navy Blue Sweatshirts
description: Composition Blue sweatshirt made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has a round neck, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, a ribbed hem, and brand badge with graphic print on the front Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash in warm water with similar colours Do not dry clean Use a non-chlorine bleach if needed Do not iron on print Every style maven's wardrobe must have an off-duty essential like this blue batman jersey from bioworld. Pair this with distressed jeans and arty sneakers to complete your functional yet fashionable look. Model statistics The model wears size M in sweatshirts Height: 6', Shoulders: 18
